subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the Name of God, who gazeth upon His countenance, and who speaketh in His remembrance and praise, hearken unto the call of this Youth but once [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسم الله و الناظر الی وجهه و الناطق بذکره و ثنائه اسمع ندآء الغلام مره
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
